# GitHub Store

> Free, open-source app store for GitHub releases. Cross-platform (Android, Windows, macOS, Linux). Apache-2.0. Built by Usmon Narzullayev with Kotlin Multiplatform + Compose Multiplatform. Discovery, silent install, signing-key verification, and a multi-source mirror system for restricted networks.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://github-store.org/): What GitHub Store is, who uses it, FAQ, About panel.
- [Download](https://github-store.org/download/): Per-platform install methods. Android (APK direct, F-Droid, Obtainium). Windows (EXE, MSI, Scoop, Winget). macOS (DMG arm64/x64, PKG). Linux (AppImage, DEB, RPM, pacman). SHA-256 signing fingerprint for verification.
- [Features](https://github-store.org/features/): Full feature catalog. Discovery, release browser, mirror system, rich details, app management (Library Imports, Obtainium import/export, Shizuku/Sui/Dhizuku silent install), collections, announcements feed, authentication, tweaks, localization (13 languages), network & performance.
- [Press](https://github-store.org/press/): Boilerplate (1-sentence / 1-paragraph / 3-paragraph). Brand assets, color palette, screenshots, founder bio, "Featured in" list, quick facts table, press contact.
- [Sponsors](https://github-store.org/sponsors/): Donation rails (GitHub Sponsors, Buy Me a Coffee, Liberapay, Ko-fi). Tier ladder ($3/$10/$25 per month). Where the money goes (infra/certs/translation). Sponsor wall + FAQ.
- [Privacy Policy](https://github-store.org/privacy-policy/): Privacy-first explainer. No personal data collected by default. Optional anonymous analytics opt-in. Newsletter handled by Buttondown, separate from app.

## Blog

- [Blog index](https://github-store.org/blog/): Founder essays, position posts, comparison guides, engineering deep-dives.
- [Blog RSS](https://github-store.org/blog/feed.xml): RSS 2.0 feed of latest posts.

## Project resources

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/OpenHub-Store/GitHub-Store): Source code, releases, issue tracker.
- [GitHub releases](https://github.com/OpenHub-Store/GitHub-Store/releases): Latest installers for every platform.
- [Wiki](https://github.com/OpenHub-Store/GitHub-Store/wiki): How GitHub Store discovers apps, installer extension list, listing requirements.
- [Discord](https://discord.github-store.org): Community + maintainer Q&A.

## Optional

- [Sitemap (XML)](https://github-store.org/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable URL list.
- [robots.txt](https://github-store.org/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
- [Founder GitHub profile](https://github.com/rainxchzed): Project author Usmon Narzullayev (@rainxchzed).
